name: Empire: Sound of the North
short_description: Empire: Sound of the North, a swipe em up cards game. Swipe the cards, go on adventures, solve puzzles and mysteries, make everyone happy and create your own kingdom.
detailed_description:
Empire: Sound of the North, a swipe em up cards game. Swipe the cards, Manage your Town, go on Adventures, solve puzzles and mysteries, make everyone happy and create your own Kingdom.

Once upon a time, your father, one of the most famous blacksmiths in the north, was known for his skill and strong character. His swords and armors were renowned not only for their beauty but also for their durability. As he worked by the hot fire of his forge, your father hoped to pass on to you that same fire and determination. 


However, time is relentless; one day, while working on his final masterpiece, your father lost his life. His loss plunged not only you but the entire village and surrounding lands into deep sorrow. What your father left behind was not just those sturdy and shining armors, but also a legacy that would keep his memory alive: this small but potentially rich piece of land. 

Just after your father's funeral, a messenger delivered a letter to you. It was King Bjorn, wanted to talk with you about the land you own now... So will you run this land with peace, or you will make the people suffer... Now the fate of a village was in your hands.

Swipe em cards up! Get ready to be the new King of the North.

Build!

Build your kingdom one by one with the new buildings system.

Progress!

Complete the missions and dungeons, be a better and powerful King!

Be Careful about your subjects!

With the new systems, you are not only responsible of the happiness of your subjects, you are also responsible of your towns well being. This is also a medieval town simulation and you are expected to need their meets while defending them against the raids!

We moved our game into Unity!

Our surprise to you is we are improving our game and moving into the Unity Engine. While we are replaced all the pictures with amazing Unreal Engine videos*; we also have improved the game mechanics. Added mechanics like Population, Army, Food, Building, Missions, Sieges and Raids, and of course Glory.

Now, while you are making your soldiers, Nobles, Clergy and People happy, you will also need to keep the balance between needs of your town and protect yourself against the coming raids. This update makes the game virtually endless while you are playing the main story.

Our Plans:

We are working on two different systems, one of them is Politics and the other is Important people. Details later.

Deepen the game with a system that you can exchange your coins with mana points. Maybe while building new buildings or taxing, lowering taxes etc.

Adding new cards and videos to the game.
